FkCandidateRouteType Enumeration

One Identity Manager API Server
Represents the type of candidate route for a property.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Handling.FkCandidates
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public enum FkCandidateRouteType
Members
  Member nameValueDescription
StaticPerMethod0 The route is method-specific, but independent from the base entity.
StaticGlobal1 The route is independent from the method and from the base entity.
Dynamic2 The route is method-specific, and the results depend on the state of the base entity.
